feed.title: SAP Community - API Management
feed.subtitle: API Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ServiceLayer query allowlist for UDT/UDO
entry.content:
Hello everybody, 

 

 

I have a problem with the allowlist from the query service layer. For example, if I want to post the following query:



{
"SqlCode": "U_CS_PROD5",
"SqlName": "U_CS_PROD5",
"SqlText": "SELECT T0.Code FROM [@CS_BDE_MAIN] T0"

}


Then I get the response:

{
"error": {
"code": 702,
"message": {
"lang": "en-us",
"value": "Table '@CS_BDE_MAIN' not accessible"
}
}
}

 

 


I defined the table in the allowlist like this:

First test:
@CS_BDE_MAIN
Second test:
[@CS_BDE_MAIN]
Third test
CS_BDE_MAIN

Afterwards I always restarted the service layer.

However, I still get the same error message.

Do you have any idea what that could be?


Thank you very much

Levin

entry.title: Return 404 when accessing ABAP API in SAP on premise
entry.content:
Hello.

Our environment is local, I developed an API, where it is possible to access it internally, but when I'm outside the company I don't receive the expected feedback, I checked the rules made in the firewall, understand that they are correct.


Below is the return I got "404 Not Found".

 

 

 

I will be grateful if someone helps me!
Neemias.

entry.title: API details needed for posting payment advice through FPAV in FI-CA
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I find below API from SAP business hub for posting payment advice, but these APIs are posting payment advice in FI module, not in FICA module.

API Reference | Payment Advice - Create | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Overview | Payment Advice (A2X) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Can someone help us to conclude if we have the API or not.

Regards.

Till

PS: Copied this question from Tech to subject group, as not replied for long.

Original Question: API details needed for posting payment advice thro... - SAP Community

entry.title: Api for CU50 Transaction
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We are looking to get details of material configuration. In the similar way we get materials when we run CU50 transaction. Is there any available API where we get components based on the material configuration maintained.

Thankyou

Amar

entry.title: Business Partner (A2X) : : Record is getting deleted and added again in S4HANA (on-prem) for PATCH
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

we could see a strange behavior in S4 system, while performing an update/PATCH operation on FAX , Phone & Mobile number of BP request (standard API: Business Partner (A2X)), looks like record is getting deleted and added again instead of direct update on existing record.

Could you please let me know what is the reason of this behavior and why it is only for FAX , Phone & Mobile number?

entry.title: The sanbox system of api business hub doesn't work and returns 401
entry.content: Testing using a restful client with the apikey header also has the same result. Looks like the apikey doesn't work any more after the sandox system gets rebooted this Friday.

entry.title: Where can I find documentation/ learning courses for API connections with external Job Boards - RCM
entry.content:
Hi team,
 
Where can I find documentation/ learning courses for API connections with external Job Boards - Recruitment module?
We have enabled in EC the Job Board functionality and we will need all candidates that have applied on the Job Board (external recruitment platform) to be visible in EC on the requisition. But now we don't have full integration as if the candidate doesn't finish the application in our Career site, they won't appear in requisition but can be found as applicants in the Job Board.
Or maybe you know other solutions on how we can add all candidate's applications from the Job Board into our requisitions?
 
Thanks so much,
Alex
 
         SAP Managed Tags:
  • SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting

entry.title: How we can use SAP MII BLS as an API in Custom UI Plugin in SAP Digital manufacturing?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am working on a Custom UI plugin which is having some table columns. 

I want to consume SAP MII BLS transaction as an API in Custom UI plugin in SAP Digital Manufacturing.

is there any possibility to consume imported SAP MII BLS transaction in Digital manufacturing custom plugin?

 

Thanks in Advance 

Regards, 
Utkarsh Raj

entry.title: How do I efficiently update a lot of entities at once?
entry.content:
I connect to the SAP service layer via Nestjs.

In the SAP software I have created User Defined Fields for the IncomingPayment entity and A/R Invoice entity.

There are already a ton of entities created and all of them have their UDF value set to null.

I decided to programmatically set them using Nestjs with a for loop.

 

So what I do is fetch /IncomingPayments (GET Request) and I set the 'Prefer' header to 'odata.maxpagesize=30000'. This way I ensure all of the Incoming Payments ever created are fetched.

I ensure only the DocEntry and PaymentInvoices properties are selected.

Using a for loop, I loop over all of the fetched entities and I then do a PATCH request to /IncomingPayments(i) where i is the current incomingpayment being looped over. By accessing the first element of PaymentInvoices (PaymentInvoices[0]) and then getting it's DocEntry property (PaymentInvoices[0].DocEntry), I get the A/R Invoice Docentry that the current incoming payment is based on.

In the patch request body I have this:

{
 "U_invoice_id": invoiceId,
}

This is the approach I use to update each incoming payment.

But, I noticed not all of them are getting updated when I use this method.

I thought the Prefer header was the cause of that so I reduced it to 1000 instead of 30000.

But that still doesn't update all incoming payments. Some are skipped and I need to run the service multiple times to update all of them.

Is there a more efficient way to do this??

Maybe in SAP itself.

Using a Script?

Help

entry.title: How to view incoming JSON requests in SAP
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using API calls for creation of Orders and Advanced Returns in SAP. As a functional, I'm aware of viewing the order creation XMLs using SXMB_MONI/SRT_MONI. My ask over here is how to view the Return orders input data or response data as return uses JSON/ODATA for interaction as per SAP help.

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: Issue Filtering on Incentive Management OData APIs (Kubernetes) PipelineRuns API
entry.content:
I'm trying to execute a GET request to retrieve PipelineRuns from the API in the subject.

In Postman, if I do a straight GET without any filters, I get 10 records back.  There are 147 rows in the CS_PIPELINERUN table for this environment as I've queried the table in WEBIDE.

I would like to be able to filter on the StartTime field of the API but I can't seem to be able to get the syntax correct.  As an example, if I want to retrieve just the one PipelineRun for March 29, 2023 at 19:05:35.480, I've tried this:  cng-pipeline/odata/PipelineRuns?$filter=StartTime eq 2023-03-29T19:05:35.480Z

This still brings back 10 records.  I then tried this (this is the actual value from the table):

cng-pipeline/odata/PipelineRuns?StartTime=2023-03-29 19:05:35.480000000

This also returns 10 records.

My questions are: 1. What is the correct syntax for filtering a PipelineRun using the StartTime?

2.  Is there some sort of limit on the number of records this API will allow to be returned and if so, how do I change/override it with a parameter?

In the documentation for the API, it says the Contact is the Incentive Management API Support Team but I can't seem to find anything about them, much less how to contact them.

I know I'm probably whistling up a tree but I'm really hoping somebody knows the answers to these questions and can help me.

Thanks in advance!

Ron

entry.title: CPI URL not returning large payload
entry.content:
Hii,

I have consumed odata url (which have more than 1lakh data for a particular date range) in iflow with http adapter , after successfully generated CPI url then test it via postman with a particular date range(input parameters) and the API return Status Code 200ok but didn't return any data. it is happening when the payload is too large.

entry.title: Authentication between SAP API Management and SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hello All,

What is the best practice to setup authentication between API Management and Cloud Integration in scenarios where APIM must trigger a CPI iFlow? 

I normally prefer using certificate based authentication by setting up a keystore in APIM and use that in the API provider that is configured for CPI. In CPI, I upload the public certificate of the keystore in the service key. However, we must purchase a certificate keypair signed by a authorised certificate authority or use a S-User generated certificate on SAP Passport. I am not aware if there is any other way to setup a key pair. Interested to know if someone can share their experience here.

I am aware that you can also use OAuth with CPI buy you must create policies inside API proxy to authenticate. Hence, I prefer the certificate based because there is no need to add additional policies in the proxy. I am curious to know how you setup this authentication in your projects?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Webhook for SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts;
I want to use Webhook with SAP integration suite for event driven iflows architecture. I foud this blog but it's not detailed and I'm new to SAP CPI. Any help please 🙂
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-em-webhook-mechanism-sap-cpi/ba-p/13450415.
I have an SAP BTP Trial account and I want to trigger insertion events in my iflow through webhook.

entry.title: API_SUPPLIERINVOICE_PROCESS_SRV is unable to park Service Purchase Order.
entry.content:
We are using this API "API_SUPPLIERINVOICE_PROCESS_SRV" to park an invoice with reference to GR and it's working as expected.

When we are trying to park it with reference to Service Entry Sheet following error returns "Service purchase order cannot be processed".

Can anyone please suggest solution?


Following is our payload.

{
  "CompanyCode": "1100",
  "DocumentDate": "2023-12-01T00:00:01",
  "PostingDate": "2024-02-27T00:00:02",
  "SupplierInvoiceIDByInvcgParty": "99296",
  "InvoicingParty": "0001800135",
  "DocumentCurrency": "PKR",
  "InvoiceGrossAmount": "93680.00",
  "SupplierInvoiceStatus": "A",
  "to_SuplrInvcItemPurOrdRef": [
    {
      "SupplierInvoiceItem": "000001",
      "PurchaseOrder": "4500062057",
      "PurchaseOrderItem": "00010",
      "TaxCode": "AY",
      "DocumentCurrency": "PKR",
      "SupplierInvoiceItemAmount": "93680.00",
      "PurchaseOrderQuantityUnit": "AU",
      "QuantityInPurchaseOrderUnit": "1",
      "ServiceEntrySheet": "1000300787",
      "ServiceEntrySheetItem": "10"
    }
  ],
  "to_SuplrInvoiceAdditionalData": {
    "SupplierInvoice": "99296",
    "FiscalYear": "2024"
  }
 
}

entry.title: OAuth SAML Bearer question
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have read through the following deep dive blog regarding OAuth SAML bearer assertion flow.

Deep Dive 8 with SAP Cloud SDK: Leverage Principal... - SAP Community

My question is: is SAP Cloud Identity registered in the SAP cloud platform as trusted IdP also the IdP for resource server (SAP S/4HANA)?

Regards,
Eric

entry.title: VMD_EI_API
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I created a Vendor API using Class VMD_EI_API=>MAINTAIN. And i passed i required fields to create the Vendor.

At last i can able to create the vendor successfully. But i'm unable to get the vendor in the program.

How to get the vendor number after gets created using  Class VMD_EI_API=>MAINTAIN.

 

Regards

Hari Prasath

entry.title: API_SALES_ORDER retuning empty values for sales order items during POST operation
entry.content:
Hello Experts

We are using SAP standard API https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_SALES_ORDER_SRV_0001/path/post_A_SalesOrder

for Sales order creation. While making POST call to create Sales order along with Sales order items the Sales order is getting created successfully along with items. However in the response Payload the items section is returned as blank and we expect the line items details that got created. Please let me know how to get the line items data as well in the response Payload during POST call.

Current response received for items:

    "to_Item" : {
      "results" : [

 

      ]

}

Regards,

Abdul Hakim

entry.title: Does crystal report 30 day trial doesn't provide 'Report Creation API'?
entry.content: I have downloaded the crystal report with 30 day trial, in the license manager I'm seeing 'report creation api: no'

entry.title: SAP Business Bydesign and SOAP UI
entry.content:
required items under the following acquisition conditions.
Also, what is the text content of the XML file to be included in the SOAP UI?

 

＜Acquisition conditions>
Invoice Request Type: Customer Return Invoice Request
External Reference: 1000


<Item to be obtained>
Invoice Request ID (Document ID)
Status
External Reference
